attacking_style: Late-race opportunistic attacks in final kilometers, often solo moves. Willing to gamble on technical finishes but execution has proven inconsistent under pressure.
team_tactics: Team commits resources early to support his position (tempo setting, jersey defense), but this can leave him isolated when final selection occurs on hardest climbs.
terrain_preference: Moderate mountain stages where he can hold position. Struggles on wet technical surfaces (cobbles) and against pure climbers on sustained steep gradients.
vulnerability: Insufficient climbing strength when facing top-tier climbers on final summit finishes. Poor power-to-weight on extended steep efforts leads to jersey losses and failed attacks.
key_patterns: Attacks in final kilometer when opportunity presents, regardless of surface conditions or form.
Team burns domestiques early for tempo/defense, leaving rider exposed in critical final moments.
Unable to defend leadership positions on hardest climbs against superior pure climbers.
Solo efforts under pressure consistently fail when execution matters most.
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 showed inability to defend yellow jersey despite team support, suggesting decline in climbing capacity against top competition
